code:
import io
import string

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)
mut count = 0
mut in_word = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(text, i)
  when Some(b)
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
    if is_ws
      in_word = false
    else
      if not in_word
        count = count + 1
        in_word = true
      end
    end
  when None
    in_word = in_word
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("#{count}")
